packages.hypothesis: Mana Vault is legal, battle-ready fast mana and appears in multiple Lorehold variants. This tests whether one-mana colorless burst accelerates commander and expensive spell windows more than Arcane Signet's colored fixing, without cutting protected medallions, Bender's Waterskin, Victory Chimes, or Jeska's Will.
